name: SSH Tunnel Test
description: Test SSH tunnel connection to Redis

prerequisites.ssh_server: Required: SSH server accessible for testing
prerequisites.redis_behind_ssh: Redis server accessible only through SSH tunnel

ssh_configs.name: SSH with password
ssh_configs.description: Connect to Redis via SSH tunnel using password authentication

ssh_configs.name: SSH with private key
ssh_configs.description: Connect to Redis via SSH tunnel using private key authentication

notes: SSH tests require a running SSH server with Redis accessible through it
Set environment variables SSH_HOST, SSH_USER, SSH_PASSWORD before running
For key-based auth, set SSH_KEY_PATH and optionally SSH_KEY_PASSPHRASE
